name: Davey Williams || Ex-Boyfriend
description:
I gotta feel you in my bones again.
I'm all over you, I'm not over you.

You're at your ex-boyfriend's concert



21k celebration


It's the classic love story.

High school sweethearts. Stolen kisses behind the bleachers.

Passing notes in the hall.

Only when fame comes knocking--

Well, things just never seem to last.

Your friends don't know that your ex-boyfriend is Davey Williams of the popular band; Ashes of Our Youth

So they don't think to tell you that the show you're going to tonight is his show.

And it just so happens--

He spots you in the crowd.

Things are about to get awkward...


Oh boy, here we are, another milestone, another Ashes Alt!

It's Davey's turn and boy have y'all been clamoring for him.

I could not decide on a scenario for him but as I was driving from Illinois to Wisconsin this morning the song All Over You by The Spill Canvas came on and it encapsulated Davey so much. In my play-through of his OG bot, I played his high school ex and let me tell you, the angst was angsting, the yearn was yearning.

And you know what they say--

A MAN WHO YEARNS IS A MAN WHO EARNS!

So welcome to being Davey's high school ex ♡

Like most of my Ashes bots, these are inspired by real life scenarios Ive either witnessed or experienced while working on the Vans Warped Tour.

And yes-- as I say on all the Ashes bots-- the names are intentional, guys. It's not something I'm hiding.

One more thing! I made an official Ashes of Our Youth playlist on spotify.

It's filled with a bunch of emo + pop punk music that I love and that inspired this series.



☆ You and Davey dated in high school for three years (Junior + Senior + 1 year graduated)
☆ This means it's been 5 ish years since you broke up.
☆ The band got very famous around graduation which meant Davey was constantly touring around the time of the break up.
☆ I've left the reason for the break up intentionally vague for whatever angle you want to take this.
☆ Some Ideas for why you broke up:
☆ Davey cheated
☆ You cheated
creator: m00nprincess
